settings.heading: To Qualify for a Return
settings.body:
• Items must be unused and in original condition.
  • Original packaging must be included.
  • Proof of purchase is required.

Refunds are processed after returned items have been inspected.

Shipping charges are generally non-refundable unless the item received is defective or incorrect.

settings.heading: Returns Policy
settings.intro:
Your satisfaction is important to us.

If you're not completely happy with your purchase, you may request a return or exchange within the eligible return period.
